spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 2 of 3 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Adds scenario focus controls plus explicit allow/block failure branches for available SecurityInfo, missing extraInfoSpec, and broken TLS.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Chrome DevTools verified the missing extraInfoSpec and broken TLS branches block Direct Socket pinning while the secure fingerprint branch allows it.

references.rationale: Cites the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link as required.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex, button overrides keep bg+color paired.

summary: Chrome DevTools verified the updated onHeadersReceived/securityInfo contract, scenario focus controls, and allow/block failure branches. No open questions remain for this concept.
